name: Spending Summary
description: Generates a spending summary with totals by category for a given date range. Use this when the user asks about spending breakdowns, where their money is going, budget overview, or category totals.
author: Michael

start_date.description: Start date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to 30 days ago.

end_date.description: End date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to today.
